title: AppCheckUpdateMethod
description: Contract for app.checkUpdate RPC method. Checks GitHub Releases for a newer app version. Respects the network_settings gate (update_check_enabled). Returns error field on failure instead of RPC error.

currentVersion.description: The version string embedded in the binary at build time.

latestVersion.description: tag_name from the latest GitHub release, with the 'v' prefix stripped. Null when the check could not be performed.

updateAvailable.description: True when latestVersion differs from currentVersion.

releaseUrl.description: html_url of the latest GitHub release. Null when the check failed.

error.description: Error code: 'network_error' | 'no_releases' | 'http_error' | 'parse_error'. Null on success. App update check is always-on (ADR-0002).
